Reduce lobster cream by half in a small sauce pot over medium-low heat.
In a 200 hotel pan, steam the potato pellets (perforated pan if in bag, regular pan and covered with plastic if out of bag)
In a hobart mixer with the whisk attachment, combine all ingredients on low speed.
Once fully mixed, reserve to parchment lined sheet trays and cool in the blast chiller
Reserve to cooler on speed rack, uncovered, for service.
